SEARCH

Uses of Package
de.uka.ilkd.key.taclettranslation.assumptions

Packages that use de.uka.ilkd.key.taclettranslation.assumptions
Package
Description
de.uka.ilkd.key.settings
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.smt
This package contains the SMT backend of KeY, allowing to translate KeY formulas to formulas in formats such as SMT-LIB, and allowing to send such formulas to SMT solvers such as Simplify or Z3.
de.uka.ilkd.key.taclettranslation.assumptions
 
  • Classes in de.uka.ilkd.key.taclettranslation.assumptions used by de.uka.ilkd.key.settings
    Class
    Description
    SupportedTaclets
    Change this file if you want to change the set of taclets that can be used for external provers.
  • Classes in de.uka.ilkd.key.taclettranslation.assumptions used by de.uka.ilkd.key.smt
    Class
    Description
    TacletSetTranslation
    This interface provides the mechanism of translating taclets to formulae.
  • Classes in de.uka.ilkd.key.taclettranslation.assumptions used by de.uka.ilkd.key.taclettranslation.assumptions
    Class
    Description
    SupportedTaclets
    Change this file if you want to change the set of taclets that can be used for external provers.
    SupportedTaclets.Category
    The category of taclets.
    SupportedTaclets.TreeItem
    TreeItem represents the user data in a tree model.
    SupportedTaclets.TreeItem.SelectionMode
     
    TacletSetTranslation
    This interface provides the mechanism of translating taclets to formulae.
    TranslationListener
    Listener for the classes which implement TacletTranslator.
